item.title: [Gold Job] Second Officer for an Offshore Support Vessel (OSV). at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A 2nd Officer/DPO position is available on a Drill Vessel. The contract duration is 8 weeks, with joining expected in June 2026. Monthly salary offered is 7,500 USD. Candidates must possess an EU passport or Schengen visa. Further details are available upon request.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd/Off DPO Job on Drill Vessel 7,500 USD at Stan Shipping Agency Ltd

item.description:
Location: Norway
Description:

An industrial painter and sandblaster is sought for a long-term contract in Norway, with a 6/2 weeks rotation. The role involves surface preparation, application of coatings using spray guns and robotic systems, and quality control. A minimum of 2 years of experience is required, with experience in fusion-bonded epoxy coating preferred. Accommodation, food, and travel are provided by the employer. This position is 90% onshore with potential for offshore work and offshore certification training.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Industrial Painter/Sandblaster Job - Norway at Stan Shipping Agency Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A 2nd Engineer is sought for a PSV vessel. The contract duration is 6 weeks, with joining expected in September 2026. The monthly salary offered is 8000 USD. Candidates must possess an EU passport or Schengen visa. Further details are available upon request.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Engineer Job - PSV - 8000 USD at Stan Shipping Agency Ltd

item.description:
Location: Poland
Description:

A Senior Online Surveyor is sought for an offshore mission in Poland, operating on a specialized vessel for subsea cable laying and nearshore trenching. Responsibilities include nearshore trenching measurements, rockbag placement, and hydrographic data analysis. The role requires 7+ years of experience, proficiency with specific survey hardware and software, and fluent English. Relevant certifications such as OGUK Medical and GWO are mandatory. The mission is scheduled from August to October 2026.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Senior Online Surveyor Job - Offshore Poland at capefront.com

item.description:
Location: Nigeria
Description:

An experienced PCE Operator is required for offshore operations in Nigeria. The role involves the preparation, installation, operation, and maintenance of Pressure Control Equipment (PCE) for well intervention activities. Candidates must have 5-10 years of relevant offshore experience, particularly with E-Line or Slickline operations in shallow water. Immediate deployment is available for qualified individuals. Mandatory certifications include BOSIET/FOET, Offshore Medical, and H2S Awareness.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] PCE Operator Job - Offshore Nigeria at KEGOZ OILSYSTEMS LIMITED

item.description:
Location: Indonesia
Description:

Experienced personnel are sought for an upcoming Jack-up Rig project in Indonesia, commencing September 2026. Open roles include Assistant Driller, Pumpman, Derrickman, Floorman, Crane Operator, Assistant Barge Master, Roustabout, STC, Radio Operator, Assistant Mechanic, Motorman, Assistant Electrician, Welder, and Materialsman. Candidates with relevant qualifications are encouraged to apply.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Crew Hiring for Jack-Up Rig Project in Indonesia at PT OMS Jasa Indonesia

item.description:
Location: Ports, terminals, quaysides, barges, vessels, and land-based project sites
Description:

Experienced Crawler Crane Operator is sought for maritime and infrastructure projects, involving safe and efficient lifting, loading, unloading, and moving operations. The role requires operating a wire crane on various sites including ports, terminals, quaysides, barges, and vessels. Responsibilities include following lifting plans, performing daily inspections, and collaborating with riggers and signalmen. A valid crane operator certificate and experience in maritime or offshore projects are essential. Applications close July 24, 2026.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crawler Crane Operator Job on Barges and Vessels at Baitali Group of Companies

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A PSV Master Tech position is available. This role requires immediate hiring. Further details regarding the specific vessel, contract, and requirements can be found via the provided application link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] PSV Master Tech Job at Jobs in Derby city,Derbyshire

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Hiring is open for various offshore vessels including DP2 AHTS, FSIV DP2, ASD Tugs, Utility Workboats, Crewboats, and SPJUBs. Master, Chief Officer, Chief Engineer, and ETO positions require 2 years in rank on the same vessel type. 2nd Officer and 2nd Engineer roles require 1 year in rank on the same vessel type. Applications are processed via the company website for faster processing.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Crew Hiring - DP2 AHTS, FSIV, Tugs at High Tiide Ship Management Private Limited
